response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience, with contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven architectures. However, her background lacks explicit executive leadership in fintech or regulated environments, and her AI experience appears more tactical than strategic for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven track record in distributed systems and real-time data processing (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, GISCollective)
Diverse technical expertise across languages and domains (TypeScript, DLang, event-driven architectures)
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+, developing technical leadership layers)
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, or high-stakes financial infrastructure)
Agentic AI work appears more tactical (tooling/frameworks) than strategic (architecture, model-agnostic design, or regulatory alignment)
